rationale: All four ACs addressed: prune command + endpoint reaps dead PIDs/age-based, stop --bead handles stale disk entries, ReconcileStaleWorkers runs on startup, and PIDAlive is exposed in JSON output. Tests included for both CLI and server.

findings.summary: Implementation lives in commit e6aff1f6 (cli/cmd/agent_workers.go, cli/internal/server/workers.go, plus reap_{unix,windows}.go for PID liveness); reviewed via git show since the diff in the prompt only included execution evidence.
